positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a crescent moon cradling a constellation of glowing, abstract geometric shapes (stars, arcs, triangles). The composition is centered and symmetrical. Use a deep indigo, midnight blue, and shimmering gold palette, evoking cosmic mystery and peaceful wonder. The style should be a clean, vector-art influenced digital illustration, suitable for screen printing on apparel. High contrast is key: strong negative space and defined silhouettes. Ensure the elements are scalable and pop off a fabric surface. Conceptually combine celestial mechanics with modern abstract art.
negative: blurry, low resolution, photorealistic, messy, artifacts, text, logo, watermark, noise, extra limbs, bad anatomy, ugly, cropped, jpeg artifacts, grain
